zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Bernak於1406年9月8日出生在英國諾福爾可謝爾方時，她的父親Sir John Bernak I33歲，母親Lady Anna Noone19歲。她和Robert Stoneham至少有1個女兒。她去世於1464年9月23日在英國哈普爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可迪林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Bernak于1406年9月8日出生在英国諾福爾可謝爾方时，她的父亲Sir John Bernak I33岁，母亲Lady Anna Noone19岁。她和Robert Stoneham至少有1个女儿。她去世于1464年9月23日在英国哈普爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可迪林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bernak
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Kurt, Otto.
Polish (mainly Bernaś) and Czech (Bernáš): from a derivative of the personal name Bernard .
German and French: from a derivative of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with ber(n) ‘bear’, e.g. Bernhard .

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Andre, Lucien, Normand, Henri, Michel, Cecile, Gabrielle.

English, Scottish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, Slovenian, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the personal name Bernard, from an ancient Germanic name, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’ (see Bernhard ). It was borne by several Christian saints, including Saint Bernard of Menthon (923–1008), founder of Alpine hospices and patron saint of mountaineers, whose cult accounts for the frequency of the name in Alpine regions. The popularity of the personal name was also greatly increased by virtue of its having been borne by Saint Bernard of Clairvaux (c. 1090–1153), founder and abbot of the Cistercian monastery at Clairvaux. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Bernardo . Bernard is the second most frequent surname in France. Compare Barnard , Benore , and Burnor .

History: The first documented bearer of this name in Canada was from the Lorraine region of France. He is recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1666 as Jean Bernard. He and some of his descendants were dit Anse or Hanse, presumably because his original forename was Hans (German equivalent of French Jean). — The Bernard families of LA have origins in France, Acadia, the West Indies, and Germany. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Bernak was born on 8 September 1406, in Shelfanger, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir John Bernak I, was 33 and her mother, Lady Anna Noone, was 19. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert Stoneham. She died on 23 September 1464, in Hampshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dillington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Bernak est née le 8 septembre 1406, à Shelfanger, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Bernak I, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Anna Noone, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert Stoneham. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1464, à Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Dillington, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Bernak am 8. September 1406 in Shelfanger, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Bernak I 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Anna Noone 19. Sie hatte mit Robert Stoneham mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. September 1464 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Hampshire, England und wurde in Dillington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Bernak è nata il il 8 settembre 1406 nel Shelfanger, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Bernak I, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Anna Noone, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert Stoneham. Morì il 23 settembre 1464, nel Hampshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Dillington, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Bernakが1406年9月8日にイギリスノーフォルクシェルファンジャーで生まれた時，父Sir John Bernak Iは33歳，母Lady Anna Nooneは19歳であった。彼女はRobert Stonehamとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1464年9月23日にイギリスハンプシュアイアで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクデリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Bernak(이)가 1406년 9월 8일 영국 노르폴크 셸파그거에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Bernak I(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anna Noone(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Robert Stoneham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 9월 23일 영국 함프실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 딜링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.8 September 1406–23 September 1464: 8 de setembro de 1406–23 de setembro de 1464
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Bernak nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1406, em Shelfanger, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Bernak I, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anna Noone, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Robert Stoneham. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1464, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Dillington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Bernak родилась 8 сентября 1406 г. в местности шелфангир, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Bernak I было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anna Noone, 19. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert Stoneham. Она умерла 23 сентября 1464 г. в местности хампшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности диллингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.8 September 1406–23 September 1464: 8 de septiembre de 1406–23 de septiembre de 1464
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Bernak nació el 8 de septiembre de 1406, en Shelfanger, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Bernak I, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Anna Noone, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Robert Stoneham. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1464, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Dillington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
